name: documents_v2
notes: All document listing and search reads come from this table (SELECT * ORDER BY uploaded_at DESC for list; SearchOrchestrator queries for search). Tag updates are written back to this table via PUT /api/documents/:id/tags (UPDATE tags WHERE id).

Rows are populated only by the trg_sync_to_v2 trigger (fired on INSERT to 'documents'); that trigger deliberately omits the tags column, so a freshly uploaded document always has null tags in this table until the user explicitly saves them through the tag editor.

name: documents
notes: New document rows are inserted here by POST /api/upload after multer saves the file to the upload directory; the name comes from req.body.name falling back to the original filename.
This table is the write-only entry point for documents; the trg_sync_to_v2 trigger fires AFTER INSERT and propagates the row to documents_v2, but all subsequent reads target documents_v2 exclusively.
